name: solar
status: PREVIEW — not wired into render.py yet. Pick this theme via the hub before adoption.
description: Cartoon kawaii solar systems. Each cluster of quests = a solar system with cartoon-faced sun (cluster lead) + planets (member quests). Black hole at center = long-term mission. Cream background, dark outlines, Fredoka font. Status by color (pink=current, gold=in-progress, teal=done, gray=planned).

cosmic_vocab.sun: cluster lead / main quest of the cluster

clustering.strategy: tag-or-domain — group quests by primary tag; fall back to keyword match on name
clustering.overflow_strategy: show top-N by progress, render '+N more' chip

positions._comment: Positions are dynamic in this theme — clusters arranged radially around the central BH. See render strategy in route.html.tmpl when wired.

wiring_steps_when_adopted: 1. Copy mocks/ogas-real-solar.html structure into themes/solar/route.html.tmpl with Jinja-style placeholders
2. Add cluster-detection logic to render.py (group_quests_by_tag or _by_domain)
3. Add theme registration to themes/_shared/README.md theme registry
4. Test render on OGAS first (preview at /ogas/route.html with theme=solar)
5. Bump version to 1, remove status:PREVIEW field
